--- Main Page ---
The Little Hippo
0
We’re The Little Hippo, an all-outdoor, counter-service sandwich shop serving up good food, good drinks, & good vibes. Here you will find an eclectic mix of specialty sandwiches, seasonal soups, tasty snacks, & fresh salads alongside a small but thoughtful list of craft cocktails, beer, & wine designed to be enjoyed in the great outdoors! There’s a gorgeous astroturf courtyard with plenty of seating options plus a covered patio with heaters & fans to keep you comfortable year round. In a hurry and want to take your food to go?
Order online
& we will have your food ready for pickup when you arrive!
Hope you’re hungry!
